message:
chore: formatting cleanup + rate_limit reset test

Whitespace-only formatting fixes across multiple files:
- bulkhead.rs: trailing whitespace
- circuit_breaker.rs: trailing whitespace
- intrusive_wheel.rs: trailing whitespace
- arena.rs: trailing whitespace + reflow long assert_eq message
- registry.rs: reflow chained method calls for readability
- websocket/client.rs: reflow comment + use pop_front for FIFO pong eviction
- websocket/split.rs: reflow enqueue_pending_pong signature + test push_back calls

rate_limit.rs: add reset_clears_pending_queue_state test verifying
that reset() zeroes pending_queue_count, clears the wait queue, and
restores full burst capacity. Also reflow fetch_sub chain and
simplify queue.clear() into a single expression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
